content:
# Amazon SDE Intern - Computer Science Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Amazon SDE Intern - Computer Science internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Toronto, ON, Canada</br>Vancouver, BC, Canada
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Amazon
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Amazon is offering a SDE Intern - Computer Science internship position in Toronto, ON, Canada</br>Vancouver, BC, Canada. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Amazon's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Amazon interview and increase your chances of success.
